channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Fans Choose KATSEYE’s ‘Pinky Up’ as This Week’s Favorite New Music
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Hey music fans, welcome to our latest update. We've got the scoop on the top trending songs of the week, and the winner is... KATSEYE with their new single "Pinky Up"!
[Short music clip of "Pinky Up" plays]
Host: This high-energy, hyper-pop track took the top spot in Billboard's fan-voted music poll, earning 50% of the vote. And what a week it was, with new releases from Lady Gaga, Doechii, Tiny Habits, and The Strokes, among others.
[Short music clip of "Runway" by Lady Gaga and Doechii plays]
Host: But "Pinky Up" rose to the top, and we're not surprised. The song was written by Justin Tranter and produced by dwilly, "hitman" bang, and FRANTS. And let's not forget the catchy music video, directed by Bardia Zeinali.
[Short music clip of "Pinky Up" plays again]
Host: KATSEYE even gave "Pinky Up" its live debut at Coachella, and the crowd loved it. We caught up with the group after their show, and they were thrilled with the response. As Daniela said, "To perform it for the very first time, debut it at Coachella, was fire." And Megan added, "It's one of our favorites. It's very hard-hitting, something that makes us feel confident."
[Outro music plays]
Host: So, there you have it. KATSEYE's "Pinky Up" is the clear winner of the week. Check out the song and the rest of the top releases on Billboard's website. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you in the next update!
